title: Incident Entry
description: Operationally polished phrases for outages, near misses, and the art of saying the system was fine until users touched it.

category.description: Category slug used in API paths.

tags.description: Searchable tags for browsing and filtering.

created_at.description: Initial publication date in ISO local date form.

updated_at.description: Most recent update date in ISO local date form.

excuse.description: The polished line as it would appear in the wild.

delivery_context.description: Where the line is usually deployed.

when_to_use.description: Conditions that make the excuse survivable.

when_it_fails.description: Audience or evidence that ruins it immediately.
